Although the members of the board
have no assurance that Mr.. Graves
will grant their request, they are hop
ing he will grant the desired result
and are depending On his geHeral

1t is believed that II Mr.. Graves
grants the request of the board the
Washington Water Power company
will emulate the example.


Once before the board tried TO ac-
complish this purpose, and visited the
Washington Water Power people, but
were turned down.
In view of the value Of the fran
chises which have been given to the
traction companies by. the city and
that are yet desired by them from
the city-franchises that are worth
thousands of dollars--the members
of the board hope the traction COM
panies will see the wisdom Of display
ing little liberality on their own
